# ForgeRSS External Service

This directory is reserved for a local checkout of [ForgeRSS](https://github.com/tmwgsicp/ForgeRSS).

`langgraph-study` treats ForgeRSS as an external crawler, similar to `external/wechat-download-api`.
The Python package does not import ForgeRSS source code directly. Instead:

1. ForgeRSS logs in to Xiaohongshu and generates RSS XML.
2. `langgraph-study` reads the generated RSS feed through `ForgeRSSXiaohongshuClient`.

## Setup

Clone ForgeRSS into this directory:

```bash
python scripts/setup_forgerss.py
```

Or manually:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/tmwgsicp/ForgeRSS.git external/ForgeRSS
```

Install ForgeRSS dependencies inside its own environment:

```bash
cd external/ForgeRSS
python -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## First Login

Xiaohongshu requires a logged-in browser profile:

```bash
cd external/ForgeRSS
.venv/bin/python -m generators.social.xiaohongshu.scraper --login
```

## Generate Xiaohongshu Feed

```bash
XHS_USER_ID="https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/<user_id>?xsec_token=..." \
  .venv/bin/python scripts/run_single.py xiaohongshu_user --max 10
```

The generated feed is expected at:

```text
external/ForgeRSS/feeds/feed_xiaohongshu_user.xml
```

Configure `langgraph-study`:

```bash
XIAOHONGSHU_PROVIDER=forgerss
XIAOHONGSHU_FORGERSS_FEED_FILE=/var/work/l11li/langgraph-study/external/ForgeRSS/feeds/feed_xiaohongshu_user.xml
```

## Notes

- `profiles/`, `feeds/`, `cache/`, `data/`, and `downloads/` are generated by ForgeRSS and should not be committed.
- If the feed stops updating, verify Xiaohongshu login state:

```bash
cd external/ForgeRSS
.venv/bin/python tools/test_login_check.py xiaohongshu
```
